_meta.description: Biblical covenants as recorded in scripture
_meta.note: Terms and conditions as explicitly stated in the text

covenants.name: Adamic Covenant
covenants.context: Garden of Eden - conditions for dwelling there
terms: Be fruitful and multiply
Fill the earth and subdue it
Have dominion over all creatures
Eat from any tree except the tree of knowledge of good and evil
Death as consequence for eating from forbidden tree

covenants.name: Noahic Covenant
terms: Never again destroy all life by flood
Seedtime and harvest shall not cease
Be fruitful and multiply
Every moving thing given as food
Do not eat blood
Whoever sheds man's blood, by man his blood shall be shed

covenants.name: Abrahamic Covenant
terms: Make Abraham a great nation
Bless Abraham and make his name great
Abraham will be a blessing
Bless those who bless him, curse those who curse him
All families of earth blessed through him
Give the land of Canaan to his descendants
Descendants as numerous as stars and sand

covenants.name: Mosaic Covenant (Sinai)
covenants.context: Mount Sinai after exodus from Egypt
terms: Israel to be God's treasured possession
Israel to be a kingdom of priests and holy nation
Obedience to God's commands required
Ten Commandments given
Detailed laws for worship, civil life, and conduct
Blessings for obedience, curses for disobedience

covenants.name: Priestly Covenant (Phinehas)
terms: Covenant of peace
Perpetual priesthood for Phinehas and descendants

covenants.name: Deuteronomic Covenant
covenants.context: Plains of Moab before entering Canaan
terms: Renewal of Sinai covenant with new generation
Love God with all heart, soul, and strength
Teach commands to children
Detailed blessings for obedience
Detailed curses for disobedience including exile

covenants.name: Davidic Covenant
covenants.context: David's desire to build a temple
terms: God will make David's name great
God will establish a place for Israel
David's son will build the temple
God will establish the throne of his kingdom forever
God will be a father to David's son
Discipline for wrongdoing but love not withdrawn
David's house and kingdom eternal

covenants.name: New Covenant
covenants.context: Prophesied through Jeremiah; instituted by Jesus
terms: Law written on hearts, not stone
God will be their God, they will be his people
No need to teach neighbor to know God - all will know him
Forgiveness of sins - iniquity remembered no more

covenants.name: Salt Covenant
terms: Perpetual covenant
Priests receive portions of offerings

covenants.name: Covenant with Levi
terms: Covenant of life and peace
Levites to revere God
True instruction in their mouth
Walk with God in peace and uprightness
Turn many from iniquity

covenants.name: Land Covenant (Palestinian)
terms: Regathering from all nations after exile
Circumcision of heart
Return to obedience
Curses placed on enemies
Prosperity in the land
